response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates impressive 20+ years of technical depth across multiple domains and impressive execution as a Staff-level engineer, this role explicitly requires specialized AI strategy expertise. The candidate's very recent AI infrastructure work (starting April 2025) and lack of demonstrated AI products, thought leadership, or strategic AI positioning represent critical gaps for a Director-level Principal Engineer focused on AI Strategy. Strong technician, wrong specialization.
strengths: Exceeds experience requirement with 20+ years across web, mobile, infrastructure, and embedded systems
Demonstrated entrepreneurial drive through GISCollective open-source platform founding and ongoing development
Recent exposure to AI infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field; lacks formal AI credentials preferred for the role
No demonstrated AI products, platforms, or recognized AI thought leadership despite the role's explicit AI strategy focus
Currently positioned at Staff level; role requires Director-level individual contributor with strategic influence and recognized expertise

key_factors.factor: Lack of demonstrated AI expertise and strategic AI products
20+ years of solid technical engineering execution
